zh.Winkleigh, Devon, England, United Kingdo: 英國英格蘭戴文文可利
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John de Punchardon - Lord of Uly, Heir of Punchardon於大約1260年出生在英國英格蘭戴文時，他的父親Sir William de Punchardon II31歲，母親Ermegard26歲。他與Isabel Paulett結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。

zh-hans.Winkleigh, Devon, England, United Kingdo: 英国英格兰戴文文可利
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John de Punchardon - Lord of Uly, Heir of Punchardon于大约1260年出生在英国英格兰戴文时，他的父亲Sir William de Punchardon II31岁，母亲Ermegard26岁。他与Isabel Paulett结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Lord
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: nickname from Middle English laford, louerd, lord ‘lord, master’ (Old English hlāford), perhaps given to a someone who played the part of the lord or master of ceremonies in festival games.
Irish: adoption of the English name (see 1 above) as a translation of the main element of Gaelic Ó Tighearnaigh (see Tierney ) and Mac Thighearnáin (see McKiernan ).
Americanized form of French Laure, a variant of the personal name Laur 3.

variants.name: Tierney
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Eamon, John Patrick, Brigid, Clodagh, Kieran, Michael Sean, Siobhan.

Irish: shortened form of O'Tierney, an Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Tíghearnaigh ‘descendant of Tighearnach’, a byname meaning ‘lord, master’. The Gaelic name is sometimes ‘translated’ as English Lord . Compare Tiernan .

variants.name: Lords
meanings: English: variant of Lord , with post-medieval excrescent -s. This surname is rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Korean Kyong, Kyong Suk, Young, Chae, Chi Young, Hang, Kil, Rin, Sang Hun, Chang, Chong, Insoo, Kum, Sun Young, Yom, Young Hwan.  Cambodian Kiwan, Oeurn, Phoeun, Pich, Saroeuth, Seung, Sophath, Sophea, Yoeun, Phan, Son.  Indian Shanti, Harendra.
Indian (Uttar Pradesh): Brahmin name, from Sanskrit om, the Hindu sacred and mystic syllable uttered at the beginning of prayers.
Cambodian: written ឱម, corresponding to the exclamation of solemn affirmation, of Sanskrit origin (see 1 above), chanted by Buddhist monks.

variants.name: Oum
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Southeast Asian Heang, Hye, Kam, Kan, Kheng, Khin, Kun, Sang, Sok, Phong, Yom, Yoo, Youn, Cuong, Phal, Samnang, Tin.  Cambodian Sokha, Chheang, Choeun, Moeun, Roeun, Sambath, Samoeun, Savuth, Soeun, Sopheap.
Cambodian: written អ៊ុំ, from a Khmer word denoting an elder sibling of one's parent (i.e. ‘uncle’ or ‘aunt’). Compare   Om   3 and   Um   2.

nameMeanings.name: Uly,
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Eduardo, Enrique, Ernesto, Jose, Julio, Leoncio, Ricardo.
German: probably an altered form of French   Louis  .
Catalan: possibly a variant of Lull . Alternatively, perhaps a variant of the apparently extinct surname Lluí, which is derived from the Latin personal name Lucinus.

variants.name: Louis
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Pierre, Andre, Antoine, Francois, Jacques, Jean Claude, Michel, Jean Robert, Ghislaine, Jeannot, Mireille, Raoul.

French, Walloon, West Indian (mainly Haiti), and German: from the French personal name Louis, derived from an ancient Germanic name (the name of the founder of the Frankish dynasty) composed of the elements hlod ‘fame’ + wīg ‘war’. This is recorded in Latin chronicles as Ludovicus (see Ludwig ), and Chlodovechus, which became Old French Clovis, Louis, a name borne by many French kings. Louis IX (1214–70), a King of France from 1226–70, is revered as a Catholic and Anglican saint; the cities of St. Louis in MO, St. Louis in MI, San Luis in AR, and San Luis in CO are among the many places called after thim. This surname is by far most common in Haiti. Compare Lewis .
Chinese: variant Romanization of the surnames 雷(see   Lei   1) and 盧 (see   Lu   1).

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John de Punchardon - Lord of Uly, Heir of Punchardon was born about 1260, in Devon, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir William de Punchardon II, was 31 and his mother, Ermegard, was 26. He married Isabel Paulett. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John de Punchardon - Lord of Uly, Heir of Punchardon est né environ 1260, à Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir William de Punchardon II, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Ermegard, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Isabel Paulett. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John de Punchardon - Lord of Uly, Heir of Punchardon um 1260 in Devon, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir William de Punchardon II 31 und seine Mutter Ermegard 26. Er hat Isabel Paulett geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John de Punchardon - Lord of Uly, Heir of Punchardon è nato il circa 1260 nel Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir William de Punchardon II, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Ermegard, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Isabel Paulett. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John de Punchardon - Lord of Uly, Heir of Punchardonが約1260年にイギリスイギリスデボンで生まれた時，父Sir William de Punchardon IIは31歳，母Ermegardは26歳であった。Isabel Paulettと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John de Punchardon - Lord of Uly, Heir of Punchardon(이)가 대략 1260년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir William de Punchardon II(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Ermegard(은)는 26세였다. 그는 Isabel Paulett(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다.

mn.Winkleigh, Devon, England, United Kingdo: Winkleigh, Devon, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John de Punchardon - Lord of Uly, Heir of Punchardon nasceu aproximadamente 1260, em Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir William de Punchardon II, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Ermegard, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Isabel Paulett. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John de Punchardon - Lord of Uly, Heir of Punchardon родился около 1260 г. в местности девон, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir William de Punchardon II было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Ermegard, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabel Paulett. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John de Punchardon - Lord of Uly, Heir of Punchardon nació aproximadamente 1260, en Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir William de Punchardon II, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Ermegard, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Isabel Paulett. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija.
